title: bursa antipoda
intro: Bursa antipoda, also known as the New Zealand woolly heads, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Bursa antipoda include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Bursa antipoda is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
